title: luzula multiflora var. calabra
intro: Luzula multiflora var. calabra, also known as Calabrian woodrush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Juncaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm skin irritations. The health benefits of Luzula multiflora var. calabra include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, with dried flowers and leaves being used in herbal medicine, although I couldn't find any reliable information on specific herbal preparations.
